title: Self-Prioritising GRCS Audit Policy and Execution Schema
description: Defines scheduling, execution policies, and enforcement actions for continuous control verification with autonomous engine integration.

policyId.description: Unique identifier for the self-prioritising Audit Policy.

autonomousPolicyRules.description: Dynamic scheduling and execution policies with autonomous engine integration.

controlVerificationInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds for control verification ( referenced by controlId ).

contextWindow.description: Number of preceding jobs required for chained context.
